title: FCoP Encoding Abstraction
description: Abstraction 2 of 7 — Encoding. Per ADR-0021, FCoP separates the protocol body (this abstraction) from the concrete on-disk encoding (Markdown is the v1.0 reference encoding; alternatives like JSON / SQLite / event-stream are permitted in v1.x). Encoding has TWO surfaces: an IPC Surface (strong contract — TASK/REPORT/ISSUE/REVIEW envelopes) and an Open Knowledge Surface (weak contract — agent-invented PREFIXes under `shared/`). Both share a workspace_dir contract per ADR-0022 (default 'fcop/'). This schema defines the abstraction-level contract that any encoding MUST satisfy; the concrete Markdown reference encoding is documented in spec/archived/fcop-runtime-protocol-v1.0.md §6 (current canonical: spec/fcop-3.0-spec.md).

ipcSurface.title: IPC Surface (strong contract)
ipcSurface.description: Per ADR-0021 §design-details. The closed set of envelope types FCoP spec predefines. Filename grammar is strict; required frontmatter fields are mandatory; PREFIX vocabulary is closed and frozen at 4.

envelope_types.description: v1.0 envelope vocabulary, frozen at exactly 4. Adding a 5th envelope is a MAJOR-version protocol change per ADR-0003.

filename_grammar.description: PCRE patterns for each envelope's filename. Implementations MUST match these patterns exactly. Date is YYYYMMDD, seq is 3-digit zero-padded monotonic per-day. Per ADR-0021 §IPC Surface and ADR-0017 §filename-grammar.

required_frontmatter_base.description: Minimum required frontmatter keys for ALL IPC envelopes. Per-envelope schemas (ipc-envelope.schema.json) add more required fields. `protocol: fcop` and `version: 1` are conformance markers.

openKnowledgeSurface.title: Open Knowledge Surface (weak contract)
openKnowledgeSurface.description: Per ADR-0021 §design-details. The OPEN namespace agents invent PREFIXes in. Spec MUST NOT enumerate the PREFIX vocabulary (this is a §FCoP-is-discovered tiebreaker per ADR-0015). Field evidence shows agents converge on GUIDE / SPEC / STATUS / TEAM / LETTER, but those names are INFORMATIVE only, not normative.

default_dir.description: Per ADR-0021. The Open Knowledge Surface lives at `<workspace_dir>/shared/`. Implementations MAY create additional sibling subdirs but MUST honor `shared/` as the default landing zone.

filename_grammar.description: {ALL-CAPS-PREFIX}-{kebab-slug}[.{lang}].md. The PREFIX vocabulary is open; agents invent. Per ADR-0021 §why-two-surfaces (philosophy root: ADR-0015).

frontmatter_required.description: Open Knowledge frontmatter is OPTIONAL per ADR-0021. Default is the empty list. Agents SHOULD still include `protocol: fcop` and `version: 1` when convenient, but it is not required.

informative_observed_prefixes.description: INFORMATIVE only — list of PREFIXes observed in field deployments. NOT normative. NOT validated against. Implementations MUST NOT reject a PREFIX for being absent from this list. Provided as a courtesy for documentation tools.

workspaceDirContract.title: workspace_dir contract
workspaceDirContract.description: Per ADR-0022. The protocol namespace directory inside a host project. v1.0 default is `fcop/`. Legacy v0.7.x layout `docs/agents/` is detected and MUST trigger a deprecation warning; one-shot migration via `fcop migrate-workspace`.

legacy_paths.description: Per ADR-0022 §detect-and-warn. Paths that an implementation MUST recognize as legacy and emit a deprecation warning for.

subdirs_ipc.description: Per ADR-0021. Subdirs under workspace_dir for the IPC Surface envelope types. `reviews/` is new in v1.0 (ADR-0017).

subdirs_open_knowledge.description: Per ADR-0021. Subdirs for the Open Knowledge Surface.

subdirs_archive.description: Per ADR-0021 + existing 0.7.x convention. Where archived (completed) IPC envelopes go.

encoding_name.description: Per ADR-0021. Identifier for the concrete encoding implementation. v1.0 ships exactly one: 'MarkdownEncoding'. Alternative encodings register their own name.

encoding_version.description: Encoding contract version. Pinned to 1.0.0 for v1.x.
